channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ex-NASCAR star Danica Patrick explains why Donald Trump will get her first-ever vote for president
item.description: Former NASCAR star Danica Patrick revealed on "Jesse Watters Primetime" that her first-ever presidential election vote will be for Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU staying humble and hungry during winning streak
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a drive that will go down in school history. The 4th-and-8 conversion to Chase Roberts. The Jake Retzlaff 27-yard scramble. And then the 35-yard strike to Darius Lassiter with 10 seconds left to beat Oklahoma State, 38-35.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Deshaun Watson's season is ended by a ruptured Achilles tendon. Browns say QB will have surgery
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Deshaun Watson won't finish the season as Cleveland's starting quarterback for the second straight year. He's injured again, and the Browns have new problems.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: After bye week, Bears hope to maintain momentum for upcoming key games
item.description: Given a week off after their offense got rolling against Jacksonville in London, Caleb Williams and the Chicago Bears might have been better served without a Week 7 bye.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Kurtenbach: Kyle Shanahan played not to lose — so the 49ers lost
item.description: Kyle Shanahan's conservative decisions set a negative tone in the 49ers' loss to the Kansas City Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: Dieter Kurtenbach, The Mercury News

item.title: Ken Griffey Sr. and Jr. will be at Lakers' opener, hoping to see LeBron and Bronny make NBA history
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — If LeBron James Sr. and his son, Bronny, make NBA history Tuesday night by playing in the same game for the Los Angeles Lakers, Ken Griffey Sr. and Ken Griffey Jr. will be there to witness it.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa could return Sunday for Dolphins after medical experts clear him to play
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Tua Tagovailoa does not want to be the face of traumatic brain injuries in the NFL, but he knows that's the reality confronting him after his latest concussion.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Nestor Cortes likely to rejoin Yankees pitching staff for World Series
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nestor Cortes appears likely to rejoin the New York Yankees pitching staff for the World Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers. The 29-year-old left-hander hasn’t pitched in a game since Sept. 18 because of a flexor strain in his pitching elbow.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USF downs UAB, 35-25, outscoring Blazers 28-6 down the stretch
item.description: TAMPA (usf) - Returning to Raymond James Stadium for the first time in three weeks, South Florida (3-4; 1-2 American) outscored UAB 28-6 down the stretch to notch its first American Athletic Conference win of the season, 35-25, over the Blazers (1-6; 0-4 American) on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Woman runs onto Steelers' field with pro-Trump sign as former president attends game
item.description: With former President Donald Trump in attendance, a woman ran onto the field during Sunday night's Pittsburgh Steelers-New York Jets game with a pro-Trump sign.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Photo Gallery: NL Champs! Dodgers finish Mets to advance to World Series
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers are heading to the 2024 World Series. With a 10-5 home win over the Mets on Sunday, the Dodgers claimed their 25th National League pennant, beating New York 4 games to 2 in the best of seven series.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, KTLA 5

item.title: National League Champions: Dodgers advance to the World Series with 10-5 win over Mets
item.description: Tommy Edman and Will Smith homered to send Shohei Ohtani into the World Series for the first time, and the Los Angeles Dodgers eliminated the New York Mets with a 10-5 victory in Game 6 of the NL Championship Series on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Utah Royals playoff dreams shattered amid 1-1 draw with Angel City FC
item.description: Utah Royals FC had a slim - but possible - chance of making the NWSL playoffs, but it was more likely they were going to be eliminated.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs stay undefeated, beat 49ers 28-18 in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: The formula might look a bit different with the defense and running game carrying the Kansas City Chiefs. But the results are awfully familiar as the two-time defending champions keep knocking off teams — especially the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: WNBA Finals reach Game 5 for first time since 2019, Liberty head back to New York
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It's fitting that a record-breaking season for the WNBA would come down to a winner-take-all Game 5 of its Finals. For the first time since 2019, the league championship will go the distance. This one will be in New York on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: CMU def. New Mexico Highlands 21-10 in homecoming game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In the second quarter, with the game tied at zero, the Cowboys sought to break the deadlock. Joey Cave handed the ball off to Mike Jones, who found space after strong blocking from his teammates.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Peterka, Thompson lead Sabres past Blackhawks 4-2
item.description: JJ Peterka scored his fourth goal in three games and assisted on a goal by Tage Thompson to lead the Buffalo Sabres past the Chicago Blackhawks 4-2 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: USU gives up 21 points in fourth quarter, lose to New Mexico
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State's losing streak hit six games, and this one was the most hearbreaking. Devon Dampier and Eli Sanders had touchdown runs in the final 3:53 to rally New Mexico to a 50-45 victory over Utah State on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Yankees get to Guardians closer Clase again, score 2 runs in 9th to win 8-6 and take 3-1 ALCS lead
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Cleveland All-Star closer Emmanuel Clase gave up two runs in the ninth inning and the New York Yankees moved closer to another World Series, beating the Guardians 8-6 on Friday night to take a 3-1 lead in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cole Kmet earns NFC Special Teams Player of the Week honors
item.description: Cole Kmet was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for Week 6 after successfully snapping on all five of the Bears' point-after attempts during their game in London against the Jacksonville Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Former SJSU basketball standout found dead in Romania
item.description: (KRON) -- Former San Jose State University Women's Basketball standout Tyra Whitehead has passed away, according to a social media post from SJSU Women's Basketball. Whitehead was a forward who went on to become a WNBA prospect with the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Illinois teen deemed ineligible for cross-country race after charity 5K
item.description: “I don’t really think there’s any reason that running a charity 5K should get me disqualified for running cross-country meets,” freshman Cole Deering said.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Bernthal, NewsNation

item.title: Cam Rising's legacy marred by injuries
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising will go down as one of the most successful quarterbacks in Utah history. Rising won 20 games over parts of three seasons, threw for 6,127 yards, 53 touchdowns, and led the Utes to back-to-back Pac-12 Championships and Rose Bowl appearances.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders approved by NFL team owners
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Brady has another new role in the NFL: owner. The seven-time Super Bowl champion purchased a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, a deal unanimously approved by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs Commanders flexed to later time slot: NFL
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears Week 8 game at the Washington Commanders has been flexed to the late afternoon window, according to a press release from the NFL League Office. The NFL announced Tuesday the Bears’ Week 8 road matchup against the Commanders has been flexed to 3:25 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
